name: atlas-hud
description: Tactical command AI HUD assistant dashboard (ATLAS)

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('www', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('www', { recursive: true }); ['index.html', 'index.css', 'app.js', 'screenshot.png'].forEach(f => { if (fs.existsSync(f)) fs.copyFileSync(f, 'www/' + f); });"
